title: Updating a PRICE with valid data
gherkin:
Given there exists a "PRICE" "Base price"
When the user updates the node "Base price" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | price | 59992 |
  | price_year | 2022 |
  | currency_code | EUR |
  | country_code | AT |
Then the request should be confirmed with status code 200
